name: Truth or Dare
description: The classic party game. Choose truth and answer honestly, or dare and do something wild!

prompts.text: What is your most embarrassing childhood memory?
Have you ever lied to get out of a bad date?
What is the most childish thing you still do?
Do your best impression of someone else in the room.
Let another player text anyone from your phone.
Speak in an accent for the next 3 rounds.
